underlying_goal: Review and improve the transport form design, then enhance the day map component with bidirectional hover linking
friction_detail: Initial DayMap implementation threw 'Invalid LatLng (NaN, NaN)' runtime errors for activities/transports without coordinates, requiring two follow-up fix attempts.
brief_summary: User asked for a transport form review, implementation of all suggestions, and map display enhancements; Claude delivered the redesign and bidirectional hover linking but introduced a NaN LatLng runtime bug that required multiple fix iterations.
